title: pelargonium × bipinnatifidum
intro: Pelargonium × bipinnatifidum, also known as the Rose Geranium or Mountain Rose, is a species of succulent plant within the Geraniaceae family, characterized by its distinctive pink flowers and divided leaves. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional herbal medicine, due to its high content of geraniol and linalool, which have antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium × bipinnatifidum include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting relaxation, and alleviating symptoms of menopause, while also exhibiting antiviral and antifungal properties. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, essential oils, and tinctures, often used to treat a variety of health issues, from digestive problems to skin irritations.
